experiences.description: Building and maintaining backend APIs using Node.js, Express.js, Sequelize, and MS SQL Server. Designed full 5-layer architecture (routes, controllers, services, repositories, models).
responsibilities: Developed and maintained RESTful APIs for production applications
Designed and implemented multi-layer architecture for scalable systems
Implemented secure authentication and authorization using JWT, cookies, and sessions
Worked on complex relational database schemas and optimized queries
Collaborated with frontend teams to integrate APIs
Deployed applications on AWS EC2 with NGINX reverse proxy
achievements: Reduced API response time by 40% through query optimization
Implemented role-based access control for multi-user environments
